controls.control_objective: To ensure also make a separate report to the board of directors of the company on the matters specified in paragraphs 124 to 126 below
controls.control_description:
In addition to the report made by the auditor under Section 143 of the Companies
Act, 2013 on the accounts of a housing finance company examined for every financial
year ending on any day on or after the commencement of these directions, the auditor
shall also make a separate report to the Board of Directors of the Company on the matters
specified in paragraphs 124 to 126 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also make a separate report to the board of directors of the company on the matters specified in paragraphs 124 to 126 below

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include a statement on the following matters, namely: (1) conducting housing finance activity without a valid certificate of registration (cor) grante

controls.control_description:

business of Housing Finance Institution as defined in Section 2 (d) of the NHB
Act and meeting Principal Business Criteria as laid down under paragraph
10(9) of these directions, the auditor shall examine whether the company has
obtained a CoR under Section 29 A of the NHB Act, 1987.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine whether the company has obtained a cor under section 29 a of the nhb act, 1987

statement on the following matters, namely: -
(1) Whether the public deposits accepted by the housing finance company
together with other borrowings indicated below viz.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also state the reasons for such unfavourable or qualified statement, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
Where, in the auditor's report, the statement/ remarks/ notes regarding any of the
items referred to in paragraphs 124 and 125 above is unfavourable or qualified, the
auditor's report shall also state the reasons for such unfavourable or qualified statement,
as the case may be.

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate such fact together with reasons therefor
controls.control_description:

items referred to in paragraphs 124 and 125 above, his report shall indicate such fact
together with reasons therefor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate such fact together with reasons therefor

controls.control_description:
Reserve Bank of India
(Housing Finance Companies) Directions, 2025)
It shall be the obligation of the auditor to make a report containing the details of such
unfavourable or qualified statements and/or about the noncompliance, as the case may
be, in respect of the housing finance company to the NHB and Department of Regulation,
Reserve Bank of India, Mumbai.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be the obligation of the auditor to make a report containing the details of such unfavourable or qualified statements and/or about the noncompliance

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain any statement with respect to compliance of any of those provisions
controls.control_description:
The duty of the auditor under paragraph 127 shall be to report only the
contraventions of the provisions of NHB Act, 1987, the RBI Act, 1934 and directions,
guidelines, instructions referred to in paragraph 127 and such report shall not contain any
statement with respect to compliance of any of those provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain any statement with respect to compliance of any of those provisions

a mechanism should ensure that all disputes arising out of the decisions of lending
institution's functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at the next higher level.

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for periodical review of the compliance of the fair practices code and the functioning of the grievances redressal mechanism at various levels

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to endeavour to send him/ her an acknowledgement/ response within a week

controls.control_description:

helpdesk or customer service number, the customer shall be provided with a complaint
reference number and be kept informed of the progress within a reasonable period of
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided with a complaint reference number and be kept informed of the progress within a reasonable period of time

controls.control_objective: To ensure send the customer its final response or explain why it needs more time to respond and shall endeavour to do so within six weeks of receipt of a compla
controls.control_description:
After examining the matter, the HFC shall send the customer its final response or
explain why it needs more time to respond and shall endeavour to do so within six weeks
of receipt of a complaint and he/ she should be informed how to take his/ her complaint
further if he/ she is still not satisfied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to send the customer its final response or explain why it needs more time to respond and shall endeavour to do so within six weeks of receipt of a compla

controls.control_description:
The HFC shall publicise its grievance redressal procedure (e-mail id and other
contact details at which the complaints can be lodged, turnaround time for resolving the
issue, matrix for escalation, etc.) for lodging the complaints by the aggrieved borrower
and ensure specifically that it is made available on its website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to publicise its grievance redressal procedure (e-mail id and other contact details at which the complaints can be lodged, turnaround time for resolving

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly display in all its offices/ branches and on the website that in case the complainant does not receive response from the company within a perio
controls.control_description:
The HFC shall clearly
display in all its offices/ branches and on the website that in case the complainant does
not receive response from the company within a period of one month or is dissatisfied
with the response received, the complainant may approach the Complaint Redressal Cell
of National Housing Bank (NHB) by lodging its complaints online on the website of NHB
or through post to NHB, New Delhi.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly display in all its offices/ branches and on the website that in case the complainant does not receive response from the company within a perio
